wizard.contactForAgencyDesc: Shown to agencies when they respond. Use the number you answer.
wizard.validationPatient: Enter the patient name and a valid age.
wizard.validationContact: Enter your contact name and phone number.
wizard.validationCareTypes: Select at least one care category.
wizard.agencyPhoneRequired: Add your phone number in your profile before publishing a package.
wizard.agencyTitleTooShort: Package title must be at least 5 characters.
wizard.agencyCategoriesRequired: Select at least one care category.
wizard.agencyPublishFailed: Could not publish the package. Please try again.
wizard.agencyServiceAreasRequired: Add at least one service area (neighborhood or district) your agency covers. This is required before you continue or publish.
wizard.agencyServiceAreasHelp: List every area you actively serve (e.g. Gulshan, Banani). Use the text field and “Add” — the small button is only for adding another area, not shown on the review step.
wizard.agencyPackageServicesIntro: Daily living and monitoring are grouped first. Checklists below follow the same care-plan buckets used across CareNet (personal, medical, household, advanced, coordination).
wizard.agencyPackageServiceBucketsIntro: These labels match how requirements are written elsewhere — pick tasks in each bucket rather than one long mixed list.
wizard.agencyReviewServiceAreasEmpty: None added — go back to package information to list the areas you serve.
wizard.agencyReviewServiceAreasBanner: You have no service areas listed. Publishing will fail until you add at least one area in step 1 (Package information).

patientIntake.emergencyContactHint: Use the person to reach first for this patient; they can be different from your own details.
